rationale: The GT's substantive concern (dsocek) is that hardcoding component names is fragile and should instead be driven by structured per-model data (packed_modules_mapping/stacked_params_mapping) to handle naming/fusion cases generically. X raises the same class of concern (hardcoded default_components list duplicated across manager.py/registry.py/offloader, propose deriving from pipeline._dit_modules) plus a grounded follow-on gap (text-encoder LoRA silent no-op), both with concrete file:line pointers and actionable fixes. Y performs thorough but purely confirmatory validation of the existing diff and surfaces no design-level concern resembling the GT's, ending in a bare approval with nothing actionable for the author to act on.
